title: Mapstale 2
description: Yet another mod that claims to be vanilla-friendly "optimization" mod. Read desc for more details!
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a0b1025919acc284206128282f76285ec848be4a.png)

This modpack is made for a vanilla-ish experience in our private minecraft server: Mapstale.However it's free to use ( as in freedom & price). It aims to optimise minecraft via some mods and add some tweaks to add a bit of more life to game. All the mods are here need to installed to the server too, but you can add some server-side mods to your server which aren't required to installed client side.Peace

**MAKE SURE IT IS ALSO INSTALLED SERVER SIDE TOO!**
